title: C.V. Anand Emerges as Front-Runner for Telangana DGP as UPSC Set to Shortlist Panel
description: Chief Secretary K. Ramakrishna Rao was scheduled to attend the UPSC meeting in New Delhi but is likely to depute the resident commissioner to attend on his behalf, in view of the swearing-in ceremony of Shiv Pratap Shukla as Telangana Governor.
